mapper.select:
/* 메뉴 조회 menu.selectList */ SELECT DISTINCT P.REAL_ORDER AS RNUM, #{menuGbn} as MENU_GBN, P.PGM_ID, P.PGM_NM AS PGM_NM, P.PGM_NM AS PGM_MON_NM, P.UP_PGM_ID, P.URL, P.LINK_URL, P.MANUAL_URL, CASE WHEN (P.URL_PATTERN IS NULL OR P.URL_PATTERN = '') AND (P.URL IS NOT NULL AND P.URL != '') THEN CONCAT(REVERSE(SUBSTRING(REVERSE(P.URL) ,LOCATE('/',REVERSE(P.URL),1))),'*.do') ELSE P.URL_PATTERN END AS URL_PATTERN, CASE WHEN P.URL IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE REVERSE(SUBSTRING(REVERSE(P.URL) ,LOCATE('.',REVERSE(P.URL),1)+1, LOCATE('/',SUBSTRING(REVERSE(P.URL) ,LOCATE('.',REVERSE(P.URL),1)+1),1)-1)) END AS URL_PAGE, P.SORT_ORDER, P.IS_LEAF, P.ATCH_FILE_ID, F.FILE_STRE_COURS, F.STRE_FILE_NM, F.FILE_SN, P.PGM_LEVEL_ID AS LEVEL_ID, P.FULL_PGM_ID, P.FULL_PGM_NM,
P.REAL_ORDER,
P.REAL_ORDER,
N2.REAL_ORDER,
IF(P3.PGM_ID IS NULL, 'N', 'Y') AS EXCEPT_YN
FROM ${masterDbId}.COM_PGM P
FROM ${templateDbId}.COM_PGM P
JOIN ( SELECT A.COMP_ID, A.PGM_ID, SUBSTR(A.FULL_PGM_ID,LOCATE('/',A.FULL_PGM_ID)+1,7) AS LV1_PGM_ID, SUBSTR(A.FULL_PGM_ID,LOCATE('/',A.FULL_PGM_ID,8)+1,7) AS LV2_PGM_ID, SUBSTR(A.FULL_PGM_ID,LOCATE('/',A.FULL_PGM_ID,16)+1,7) AS LV3_PGM_ID
FROM ${masterDbId}.COM_PGM A
FROM ${templateDbId}.COM_PGM A
INNER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT PGM_ID
FROM COM_PGM_AUTH
FROM ${templateDbId}.COM_PGM_AUTH
WHERE AUTH_GUBUN IN ( SELECT '99' UNION ALL SELECT AUTH_GUBUN FROM COM_ADMIN A WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
union all select '03' as AUTH_GUBUN from MON_DASHBOARD_ETC_CHIEF where COMP_ID = #{compId} and CHIEF_ID = #{userId}
) ) C ON A.PGM_ID=C.PGM_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.DELETE_DT IS NULL AND A.IS_LEAF = 'Y'
UNION
SELECT A.COMP_ID, A.PGM_ID, SUBSTR(A.FULL_PGM_ID,LOCATE('/',A.FULL_PGM_ID)+1,7) AS LV1_PGM_ID, SUBSTR(A.FULL_PGM_ID,LOCATE('/',A.FULL_PGM_ID,8)+1,7) AS LV2_PGM_ID, SUBSTR(A.FULL_PGM_ID,LOCATE('/',A.FULL_PGM_ID,16)+1,7) AS LV3_PGM_ID
FROM ${templateDbId}.COM_PGM A WHERE A.PGM_ID = 'PGM1766' AND IF( (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ${masterDbId}.V_COM_CODE WHERE CODE_GRP_ID = '446' AND ETC1 = #{compId} AND ETC2 = #{userId}) > 0 , 'Y', 'N') = 'Y' UNION
SELECT A.COMP_ID, A.PGM_ID, SUBSTR(A.FULL_PGM_ID,LOCATE('/',A.FULL_PGM_ID)+1,7) AS LV1_PGM_ID, SUBSTR(A.FULL_PGM_ID,LOCATE('/',A.FULL_PGM_ID,8)+1,7) AS LV2_PGM_ID, SUBSTR(A.FULL_PGM_ID,LOCATE('/',A.FULL_PGM_ID,16)+1,7) AS LV3_PGM_ID
FROM ${templateDbId}.COM_PGM A WHERE A.PGM_ID = 'PGM1766' AND IF('ispark' = #{compId}, 'Y', 'N') = 'Y'
) P2 ON P.COMP_ID = P2.COMP_ID AND P.PGM_ID IN (P2.PGM_ID, LV1_PGM_ID, LV2_PGM_ID, LV3_PGM_ID)
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT B.PGM_ID ,IF(COUNT(B.PGM_ID) = COUNT(C.PGM_ID),'Y','N') AS EX_YN FROM ( SELECT '99' AS AUTH_GUBUN UNION SELECT AUTH_GUBUN FROM COM_ADMIN WHERE COMP_ID = #{compId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
union all select '03' as AUTH_GUBUN from MON_DASHBOARD_ETC_CHIEF where COMP_ID = #{compId} and CHIEF_ID = #{userId}
) A INNER JOIN ${templateDbId}.COM_PGM_AUTH B ON B.AUTH_GUBUN = A.AUTH_GUBUN LEFT JOIN COM_PGM_AUTH_EXCEPT C ON C.COMP_ID = #{compId} AND C.AUTH_GUBUN = B.AUTH_GUBUN AND C.PGM_ID = B.PGM_ID GROUP BY B.PGM_ID
) P3 ON P.PGM_ID = P3.PGM_ID AND P3.EX_YN = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.PGM_ID, IF(D.DELETE_DT IS NOT NULL OR C.DELETE_DT IS NOT NULL OR B.DELETE_DT IS NOT NULL OR A.DELETE_DT IS NOT NULL,'Y','N') AS DELETED FROM ${masterDbId}.COM_PGM A LEFT JOIN ${masterDbId}.COM_PGM B ON A.UP_PGM_ID= B.PGM_ID LEFT JOIN ${masterDbId}.COM_PGM C ON B.UP_PGM_ID= C.PGM_ID LEFT JOIN ${masterDbId}.COM_PGM D ON C.UP_PGM_ID= D.PGM_ID LEFT JOIN ${masterDbId}.COM_PGM E ON D.UP_PGM_ID= E.PGM_ID ) P4 ON P.PGM_ID=P4.PGM_ID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.PGM_ID, IF(D.DELETE_DT IS NOT NULL OR C.DELETE_DT IS NOT NULL OR B.DELETE_DT IS NOT NULL OR A.DELETE_DT IS NOT NULL,'Y','N') AS DELETED FROM ${templateDbId}.COM_PGM A LEFT JOIN ${templateDbId}.COM_PGM B ON A.UP_PGM_ID= B.PGM_ID LEFT JOIN ${templateDbId}.COM_PGM C ON B.UP_PGM_ID= C.PGM_ID LEFT JOIN ${templateDbId}.COM_PGM D ON C.UP_PGM_ID= D.PGM_ID LEFT JOIN ${templateDbId}.COM_PGM E ON D.UP_PGM_ID= E.PGM_ID ) P4 ON P.PGM_ID=P4.PGM_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ${masterDbId}.COMTNFILEDETAIL WHERE (ATCH_FILE_ID, FILE_SN) IN ( SELECT ATCH_FILE_ID, MAX(FILE_SN) AS FILE_SN FROM ${masterDbId}.COMTNFILEDETAIL GROUP BY ATCH_FILE_ID ) ) F ON P.ATCH_FILE_ID=F.ATCH_FILE_ID WHERE 1=1 AND P4.DELETED='N' ORDER BY
P.REAL_ORDER
P.REAL_ORDER
IFNULL(N2.REAL_ORDER, 9999)

/* 메뉴 아이콘 조회 menu.selectMenuIconList */ SELECT A.PGM_ID, B.FILE_STRE_COURS , B.STRE_FILE_NM , B.ORIGNL_FILE_NM , B.FILE_EXTSN FROM ( SELECT PGM_ID, ATCH_FILE_ID FROM COM_PGM UNION ALL SELECT PGM_ID, ATCH_FILE_ID FROM COM_PGM ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT A.ATCH_FILE_ID, A.FILE_STRE_COURS , A.STRE_FILE_NM , A.ORIGNL_FILE_NM , A.FILE_EXTSN FROM COMTNFILEDETAIL A INNER JOIN ( SELECT COMP_ID, ATCH_FILE_ID, MAX(FILE_SN) AS FILE_SN FROM COMTNFILEDETAIL GROUP BY COMP_ID, ATCH_FILE_ID ) B ON A.COMP_ID=B.COMP_ID AND A.ATCH_FILE_ID=B.ATCH_FILE_ID AND A.FILE_SN=B.FILE_SN ) B ON A.ATCH_FILE_ID=B.ATCH_FILE_ID WHERE A.ATCH_FILE_ID IS NOT NULL
